Programs at Branky STEM Labs

Hands-on, level-wise learning designed to help
young minds explore, build and understand future technologies.

Programs

A Learning Journey for Every Young Tech Explorer

A progressive learning journey that grows with your child's skills, creativity and ambition.

Age: 4–6 Years
Structured Learning Program

STEM Foundations Program

  • Early Robotics & STEM Exploration
  • Logic Building, Creativity & Engineering Concepts
  • Button-Based Coding & Interactive Activities
Know More →
Age: 7–10 Years
120 Hours Program

Foundation of Robotics – Level 1

  • Robotics, Electronics & Circuit Flow
  • Sensors, Mechanics & Robot Building
  • Block Coding & Technology Fundamentals
Know More →
Age: 7–10 Years
120 Hours Program

Advanced Robotics – Level 2

  • Advanced Robotics & Smart Systems
  • Intelligent Sensors & Logic Programming
  • Basic AI Concepts & Technical Projects
Know More →
Age: 11–14 Years
120 Hours Program

Core Robotics & Coding Program

  • Robotics Engineering & Coding Concepts
  • Electronics, Machine Systems & Programming
  • Problem Solving & Project Development
Know More →
Age: 11–14 Years
120 Hours Program

Advanced Robotics, IoT & Smart Machines

  • IoT Systems & Smart Machine Development
  • Automation Logic & Connected Technologies
  • Advanced Projects & Real-World Applications
Know More →
Free Demo Session

Not sure which program is right
for your child?

Book a Free Demo Session — experience the lab, meet the mentors and let your child try a hands-on session before you decide anything.

Book Free Demo — It's Completely Free

Seats fill fast · Vadodara only · No commitment required

Vadodara's full-fledged AI, Robotics & Coding centre for ages 4–14, built around hands-on learning, smart labs and real technology exposure.
